ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity (e.g., Iron Ore) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the commodity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commodity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the commodity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the commodity data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate entry */,
  "currency_pair" TEXT /* The currency pair for which the exchange rate is applicable (e.g., USD/EUR) */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency in the pair */,
  "target_currency" TEXT /* Target currency in the pair */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* The exchange rate value */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_currency_pair FOREIGN KEY ("currency_pair") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("currency_pair")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity price entry */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity being priced */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the commodity */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the commodity price is quoted */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the commodity price */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume for the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodity_prices_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity associated with the alert */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, price rise) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the alert is active */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold (e.g., percentage, absolute value) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alert checks (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last trigger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price record */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commodity */,
  "price" REAL /* Historical price of the commodity */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is recorded */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price record */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume for the price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data content of the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)
